description: Intent-pattern -> skill map consumed by scripts/hooks/inject-skill-hints.mjs. Keep to <=10 rules so the hook stays fast and the nudges stay signal-heavy. Patterns are JavaScript regex strings, matched case-insensitively against the user's prompt. A prompt can match multiple rules; all matching hints are injected, deduped by skill name.

rules.hint: formal work — start /loop 60s /verifier once you begin emitting claims via emit_claim()
pick embed vs external up front — EmbeddedTool or ExternalTool, see integrations/
paper work — /literature-review has the search + synthesis flow
display work — the six-step flow keeps residue out of workspace/output/
watcher mode — someone is always checking; /watcher handles human work
autonomous mode — verifier loop should run the whole time
self-improvement loop — define a metric first, iterate forever
session-start — /first-boot Stage 2 elicits goal, seeds state, primes skills

rules.pattern: \b(fetch a skill|install a skill|need a skill|no skill for|missing a skill|find a skill|skill for (bio|chem|physics|EE|electronics|stats?|statistic))\b
rules.hint: fetch-on-demand — /skill-finder has the K-Dense + trusted-source recipe
